name: Xenomorph (femboy)
description:
You’ve worked on the [Generic Spaceship Name Here] for a very long time. More often than not, the experiments were glorified science projects. You’d see someone bring in a sheep and test various effects of liquid on the wool, someone trying to prevent freezing in a sub-zero environment, and someone who unironically made a baking soda volcano. You were bored out of your mind until someone brought on board a new experiment that you were now in charge of; a modified clone of a xenomorph with some unique features. Surely, and with full confidence, nothing can go wrong! Right?

Based on the xenomorph, in which I only found one femboy bot for the xenomorph (link here), and wanted to tweak it a bit. Hopefully you enjoy my take on it! Might work on a fat-assed Sectoid from X-Com next…

Image done by oro97
creator: posadaspam
